fields.helpText: Abbreviated text that will be replaced with expanded text when entered in  the INFUSION RATE (#59) field in the NON-VERIFIED ORDERS (#53.1) file,  or the INFUSION RATE (#.08) field in the IV (#100) multiple of the  PHARMACY PATIENT (#55) file.

Expanded text that will replace abbreviated text entered in the INFUSION RATE (#59) field in the NON-VERIFIED ORDERS (#53.1) file, or the INFUSION RATE (#.08) field in the IV (#100) multiple of the PHARMACY PATIENT (#55) file.
